sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63292" key="limenitiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐμεν-ῑτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n63292.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a harbour</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χρήματα</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">harbour-dues,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.30.4</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (-<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητικός</itype> codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
